summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PUBG UC Rewards PWA app. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with excellent Arabic/English language support and RTL layout.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for missing token
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - both status codes indicate authentication failure

passed_tests: User registration with username, email, password, PUBG ID
User login with email and password
Admin login with admin@pubguc.com / admin123
Watch ad button earns 5 points correctly
Points balance displays and updates correctly
UC packages display with correct point costs (6 packages found)
Redeem UC package correctly rejects insufficient points
Redemption history shows user's requests
Referral code generation and display working
Copy referral code functionality working
Language toggle (Arabic/English) working perfectly
RTL support for Arabic implemented correctly
Admin dashboard shows stats (users, points, redemptions)
Admin can view all users
Admin tabs navigation working (dashboard, users, redemptions)
Navigation between pages works smoothly
Backend API endpoints all functional
Frontend-backend integration working correctly
Authentication and authorization working properly
Points system and ad watching simulation working
Referral system functional
